# Best AI Code Tools for Mobile Apps in 2026

Mobile app development involves multiple platforms, complex UI, and endless edge cases. AI tools help you build better apps faster!

Check out our [[link:/category/Code|Code category]] for more AI tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]]: Mobile Code Generation

[[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]] helps you write Swift, Kotlin, Flutter, and React Native code.

### Copilot for Mobile
- **Multi-platform**: iOS, Android, cross-platform
- **UI components**: Generate mobile UI code
- **API integration**: Connect to backend services

**Try GitHub Copilot**: https://github.com/copilot

---

## [[link:/tools/13|Cursor]]: AI-First Mobile Development

[[link:/tools/13|Cursor]] offers an AI-first IDE perfect for mobile development.

### Cursor for Mobile
- **Mobile-specific**: Understand mobile patterns
- **Debugging**: Diagnose mobile issues
- **Performance**: Optimize app speed and battery

**Try Cursor**: https://cursor.sh

---
